explanations.note: call meanings follow standard 2/1 Game Force

options.text: 3♠ — Lebensohl after double — 12+ HCP. Next call is usually Pass (94%); Double (6%); most common continuation: Pass 3NT Pass (67%). A strong engine chooses this 20% of the time here. Where it leads: 3NW (70%), 4DE (11%), 6NW (7%). The winner (EV gap >= 0.5 IMPs): +2.0 IMPs vs 4♥ (±0.6); wins on 42% of layouts against 33%.

4♥ — 13-24 HCP, 4+ ♥. Next call is usually Pass (100%); most common continuation: Pass Pass Pass (79%). A strong engine chooses this 9% of the time here. Where it leads: 4HE (79%), 4HXE (6%), 6HE (5%). Scored -2.0 IMPs vs the top choice (±0.6); wins on 33% of layouts, pushes on 25%.

3♦ — 9-12 HCP, 4+ ♦. Next call is usually Pass (98%); 3♠ (1%); 4♣ (0%); most common continuation: Pass Pass Pass (77%). A strong engine chooses this 34% of the time here. Where it leads: 3DE (77%), 3NW (14%), 7HW (3%). Scored -3.9 IMPs vs the top choice (±0.5); wins on 14% of layouts, pushes on 21%.

3♥ — 9-12 HCP, 4+ ♥. Next call is usually Pass (98%); 3♠ (1%); 4♣ (0%); most common continuation: Pass Pass Pass (78%). A strong engine chooses this 21% of the time here. Where it leads: 3HE (78%), 6HE (7%), 5DE (5%). Scored -3.8 IMPs vs the top choice (±0.5); wins on 20% of layouts, pushes on 8%.
